objective: Test whether an explicit, calibrated decomposition of 15-minute long and short net utility into profit probability, conditional gain mean, and conditional loss mean improves after-cost action-value ranking and fixed-policy economics over a matched direct conditional-mean control.

consumed_15m_probability_tail_diagnosis.method: Reconstruct calibrated Round 48 probabilities from all six hash-verified prediction artifacts, choose the side with the larger worst-seed probability for each symbol-time row, and rank the already-consumed 2025-H1 rows without changing any policy.
consumed_15m_probability_tail_diagnosis.interpretation: Probability discrimination alone did not rank after-cost magnitude. A new model must predict conditional gain and loss severity and must beat a direct action-mean control; a probability threshold is not a justified mechanism.

prior_hurdle_negative_controls.round_34: A BTC-only event-level three-action hurdle had useful opportunity and side-profit discrimination but near-chance direction routing and negative learned top-tail economics.
prior_hurdle_negative_controls.round_38: Minute LightGBM hurdle candidates generated activity, but the only positive calibration cell reversed sharply in 2025-H1 and every viability candidate failed after costs.
prior_hurdle_negative_controls.constraint_carried_forward: Round 49 must preserve the stronger shared temporal direction model, measure monthly stability, and reject calibration-only gains.

research_basis.finding_used: Decision-focused learning can be expressed as learning to rank feasible decisions, supporting a bounded action-value ranking term beside proper pointwise objectives.
research_basis.limitation: Ranking does not calibrate probabilities or magnitudes and cannot replace the economic replay gates.

research_basis.finding_used: Trading-cost-aware economic objectives are required because statistically accurate forecasts can create an inefficient implementable frontier after turnover and costs.
research_basis.limitation: The paper studies cross-sectional portfolios, not minute crypto futures, and its reported performance is not imported.

research_basis.finding_used: Recent walk-forward BTC evidence finds that naive forecast signs fail after realistic costs and that cost-aware abstention materially affects economics.
research_basis.limitation: The non-peer-reviewed study uses hourly BTC and selected configurations; Round 49 uses its own fixed chronology and cost ledger.

research_basis.finding_used: Independent deep ensembles provide a practical predictive-uncertainty signal and can expose distribution shift without modifying the base training procedure.
research_basis.limitation: Ensemble disagreement is an abstention input, not proof of financial edge or a calibrated loss bound.

research_basis.finding_used: Order-book research demonstrates that predictive uncertainty can be used to avoid unnecessary trades and control position sizing.
research_basis.limitation: Round 49 has minute price-flow features rather than historical L2 books and uses uncertainty only to abstain.

research_basis.finding_used: Selective prediction formalizes a model's ability to abstain when conditional risk is high.
research_basis.limitation: Round 49 does not optimize a coverage quota because forced activity is unsafe in trading.

research_basis.finding_used: Low-capacity held-out calibration can improve neural probability reliability without changing score ordering.
research_basis.limitation: Image and text calibration results do not guarantee temporal financial calibration, so month-level drift is measured explicitly.

research_basis.finding_used: Temporally related forecast horizons can act as auxiliary tasks for a shared sequence representation.
research_basis.limitation: The 30-minute target is representation-only and may not route, open, size, or extend a trade.

research_basis.finding_used: Current LLMs retain material numerical and time-series reasoning weaknesses even when retrieval improves textual finance tasks.
research_basis.limitation: A finance language model remains a paired asynchronous veto only and cannot repair a failed numerical candidate.

data_contract.sequence_gap_rule: No training or inference window may cross a missing five-minute timestamp or symbol boundary.

uses: shared gain and loss mean multipliers

chronological_roles.role_boundary_rule: Entry, complete target path, exit, and funding cash flows must remain inside one role.

target_contract.signed_return_bps: Funding-adjusted long gross open-to-open return for the specified horizon.
target_contract.profit_label: one iff the side-specific net return is strictly positive
target_contract.conditional_gain_bps: side-specific net return conditional on profit_label equal to one
target_contract.conditional_loss_bps: negative side-specific net return conditional on profit_label equal to zero

observed_training_target_geometry.purpose: Set training-only scales and required diagnostics; no policy threshold is selected from these values.
observed_training_target_geometry.interpretation: The probability base rate and magnitude scale are symbol-dependent. Positive action value requires calibrated probability and both severity means; probability ranking alone is insufficient.

normalization_contract.features: Round 48 per-feature median and scaled IQR with scale floor 1e-6 and normalized clipping to [-12, 12].
normalization_contract.direct_action_means: Per-symbol and side training arithmetic mean and population standard deviation; the unmodified normalized MSE elicits the original conditional mean.
normalization_contract.conditional_severities: Per-symbol, side, and outcome training conditional arithmetic mean. The network predicts a positive multiplier around one.
normalization_contract.auxiliary_signed_return: Training median and scaled IQR for the 30-minute signed return; no target clipping.

model_contract.family: shared per-symbol causal large-kernel temporal convolution with explicit side-action heads

candidates.mechanism: Calibrated side-profit probabilities plus direct side-specific conditional-mean net utility trained by normalized MSE.
The same probability and auxiliary tasks, with primary action value derived from calibrated profit probability and separately learned conditional gain and loss means.
candidates.single_primary_change_from_control: Replace direct primary action-mean regression with two conditional positive-mean heads and the exact expected-net identity.

shared_heads.profitability: Independent short and long logits for 15 and 30 minutes with no class weighting.
shared_heads.auxiliary_30m_signed_mean: One normalized 30-minute signed-return mean used only for representation learning and diagnostics.

hurdle_primary_heads.conditional_gain_mean: Two strictly positive training-baseline multipliers using softplus plus 1e-4.
hurdle_primary_heads.conditional_loss_mean: Two strictly positive training-baseline multipliers using softplus plus 1e-4.
hurdle_primary_heads.positive_mean_score: Conditional Gamma mean score y / mu + log(mu), which is minimized at the conditional arithmetic mean; rows outside the relevant condition contribute zero and are excluded from the denominator.

model_contract.peer_training: Seeds are independently initialized and trained on identical candidate data; no peer-consistency term is permitted.
model_contract.policy_uncertainty: The worst seed determines eligibility; ensemble disagreement can only cause abstention.

early_stopping.criterion: The candidate's complete proper pointwise objective plus its fixed bounded action-value rank term.

model_contract.compute_backend: DirectML required for the host experiment; CPU remains an explicit portability mode.
model_contract.candidate_selection: None; both candidates complete the same consumed-development evaluation.

calibration_contract.probability_method: One bounded positive-slope Platt transform per seed and candidate, shared across horizons, symbols, and sides.
calibration_contract.probability_objective: Unweighted binary log loss over all calibration side-action rows.
calibration_contract.hurdle_severity_method: One positive multiplicative calibration scalar for gain and one for loss per seed, shared across symbols and sides and fitted by the analytic Gamma mean-score optimum.

hurdle_mechanism_gate.claim_if_failed: The hurdle decomposition did not add trustworthy action-value information and must not be retained because of a favorable isolated return.

fixed_policy_contract.position_sleeves: Fixed one-third unlevered notional sleeve per symbol.
fixed_policy_contract.entry_rule: When a symbol is flat, a side is eligible only when every seed predicts strictly positive calibrated 15-minute net utility for that same side. Choose the side with the larger worst-seed expected net utility; exact ties abstain.
fixed_policy_contract.holding_rule: Hold exactly 15 minutes and flatten; no same-symbol overlap or horizon extension is permitted.
fixed_policy_contract.stress_rule: Reprice the exact base trade ledger without reselecting timestamps or sides.

economic_gate.promotion_result: Still denied because 2025-H1 is consumed development evidence.

ai_contract.paired_ablation: Use identical deterministic candidate actions and compare ML-only with ML-plus-AI veto outcomes; provider failure is a veto.

required_outputs: dataset feature target and role identities
training-only target geometry by symbol side and role
DirectML preflight fallback runtime and memory evidence
six exact-reload model and prediction artifacts
probability AUC log loss Brier ECE prevalence and monthly stability
conditional gain and loss Gamma mean-score skill
expected-net MSE Spearman seed stability symbol and monthly diagnostics
fixed-ledger base and stress trades monthly symbol daily equity drawdown profit factor and bootstrap evidence
machine-readable graph data and deterministic SVG charts
